Hero.title: LUFTPHON
Hero.subtitle: A visual journey through my lens.

About.title: Behind the
About.subtitle: Lens
About.description1: I capture the raw emotions and fleeting moments of the world around me. With a background in design, I approach every shoot with a blend of structural rigor and organic spontaneity.
About.description2: Whether it's the chaotic beauty of an urban landscape or the quiet intimacy of a personal portrait, my goal is always to tell a story that words cannot.
